# scaffold-lint

> Static linter for LLM prompt scaffolds. 7 detectors for scaffold-level failure modes: over-length, technique stacking, metaphor-without-size-context, unbalanced confidence, contrastive NOTs, scaffold overreach, missing task description. Python 3.10+, stdlib-only.

## One-line summary
Lints your LLM prompt for scaffold bloat + incompatible technique mixes. Zero LLM calls.

## Install
```
pip install scaffold-lint
```

## Usage (CLI)
```
scaffold-lint lint system_prompt.md
scaffold-lint lint --text "..."
scaffold-lint rules
```

## Usage (library)
```python
from scaffold_lint import lint_text
result = lint_text("Think step-by-step. Output JSON.")
```

## Rules
- TASK_DESC_MISSING — ERROR — no imperative task statement
- SCAFFOLD_TOO_LONG — WARN — >500 estimated tokens
- SCAFFOLD_STACKING — WARN — multiple scaffold techniques mixed
- SCAFFOLD_OVERREACH — WARN — heavy scaffolding, weak task
- ABSTRACT_NO_SIZE_CHECK — WARN — metaphorical scaffolding, no model-size context
- CONFIDENCE_NO_CALIBRATION — WARN — confidence language, no calibration
- CONTRASTIVE_DETECTED — INFO — NOT-pattern scaffolds

## When to use
- CI gate on prompt changes
- Multi-tier deployment audit
- Post-hoc review of drifted prompts

## When NOT to use
- Rule-logic analysis → rule-audit
- Agent-config structural lint → lintlang
- Semantic understanding → use an LLM

## Dependencies
None at runtime. Dev: pytest, ruff.

## License
MIT

## Trust
Staged hermes-seal v1 manifest. SBOM at sbom.cdx.json.

## Home
https://github.com/roli-lpci/scaffold-lint

## Author
Rolando Bosch / Hermes Labs (hermes-labs.ai)

## Companion OSS
- lintlang (agent-config structural linter) — pip install lintlang
- rule-audit (rule-logic audit: contradictions, coverage, absoluteness)
- little-canary (prompt injection detection)
- hermes-jailbench (jailbreak regression) — pip install hermes-jailbench
- agent-convergence-scorer (N-agent output consistency) — pip install agent-convergence-scorer
- claude-router (model + scaffold router) — pip install claude-router

## About Hermes Labs
Hermes Labs (hermes-labs.ai) builds AI audit infrastructure for enterprise AI systems — EU AI Act, ISO 42001, agent-level risk testing. We open-source what we use internally. Everything is MIT, fully free, no SaaS tier. Audit work is paid; the code is not.
